fixed_from_user_review: Selective typography enlargement and row spacing for hard-to-read text.
Stale worker error is cleared after recovery and displayed only during ERROR/FATAL state.
One canonical row per instrument; conflicting long/short candidates collapse to NO TRADE.
Company Intel excludes futures, FX, crypto and index instruments.
FX is pair-specific and DXY context is not presented as a tradable FX pair.
Macro and causal context no longer masquerade as standalone trade direction.
Alpha numeric upside/probability/EV/sizing are withheld without point-in-time proof.
Poor R/R, missing evidence and stale data fail closed.
Provider/source rows are deduplicated and relative-price context is not called observed fund flow.
proof_boundary: Software, parser, fixture and semantic checks are not predictive edge.
Paid-provider authentication, entitlements and live schema reachability require the user credentials.
Point-in-time WFA, multiple-testing correction, strong baselines, costs/capacity, untouched lockbox and mature prospective evidence remain separate promotion gates.
No monitoring system can guarantee every future development; source coverage, freshness and review debt are explicit.
